_comment: CloudWatch agent configuration for the Mumbai EA-SYS production box.
_purpose: Ship the structured Pino logs written by both web + worker Docker containers (mounted at /home/ubuntu/ea-sys/logs/) to CloudWatch Logs in ap-south-1. Third notification path alongside Sentry + SES admin-alert; provides cross-region durability + log Insights querying + alarm-on-metric-filter readiness.

collect_list._comment: All app log lines (info + warn + error). Worker + web containers both write here via mounted ./logs:/app/logs volume.

Error-only stream — same source as app.log but pre-filtered by Pino's separate transport. Useful as a cheap CloudWatch alarm target (any new line = an error in prod). 90-day retention because errors are the high-value forensic data.
